_meta.author: maxim.bort.devel
_meta.title: Splashed Push Notifications
_meta.description:
Simple, splashed push notifications created from templates I found on CodePen.

For credit info, please visit https://github.com/Northstrix/Splashed-Push-Notifications

This demo utilizes the icons from https://lucide.dev/ and throws toasts with the quotes from "Losing Alice"
